coverage_note: The bundled APP population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from APP synaptic signaling, neurotransmission, protein aggregation, neuronal survival, neurodevelopment, and neurodegeneration biology and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000142192: APP coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: APP findings should be read against synaptic signaling, neurotransmission, protein aggregation, neuronal survival, neurodevelopment, and neurodegeneration biology; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

APP neurobiology variation model is curated as a APP marker for Neurological, neurodevelopmental, and neurodegenerative disease context, Synaptic signaling, excitability, neurotransmitter, and protein-homeostasis biology; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.

APP regulatory expression context model is curated as a APP marker for Neurological, neurodevelopmental, and neurodegenerative disease context, Synaptic signaling, excitability, neurotransmitter, and protein-homeostasis biology; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
